calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-029 self-attribution: dedicated P3 eval phase for n_ext >= 20
items.notes: Fix for EXQ-535 C1 FAIL (n_ext~10 < 20). Root cause: P3 eval reused P0 episodes where agent dies in ~3 steps under interval=20 injection. Fix: dedicated post-training P3 eval with interval=5/prob=1.0/auto-reset on done, targeting 50+ ext events/seed. P0/P1/P2 and criteria C0-C4 unchanged.

items.title: ARC-016 precision-to-commitment circuit: dACC precision_commit_ratio
items.notes: Requeued 2026-05-07 after SIGTERM (exit code -15) on ree-cloud-1 2026-05-06T09:28Z. Tests E3-derived precision modulating commit threshold via dACC precision_commit_ratio.
